rationale: The cited paper is referenced only once, in the future research discussion, to support a general point that quality perceptions can affect product use and outcomes. It is not used in the citing paper's core theoretical development, hypothesis construction, study design, or main mechanism tests about pseudo-free offers. The citing authors do not build directly on Shiv et al.'s framework or empirics in their reported studies. So this functions as a background supporting citation rather than a substantive directional dependency.
